hero.headline: Fresh paint, *flawless finish* — that's the standard
hero.subheadline: When your son moves out and wants his apartment perfect, you call us. When the results impress you enough to hire us again, you know you chose right.

services_section.label: THE BRUSHWORK
services_section.heading: Interior painting done right
services_section.subheading: From single rooms to full apartments, we handle every surface with care

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Transform your home's interior with our professional painting services. We handle everything from single rooms to whole house makeovers with premium paints and meticulous attention to detail.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Protect and beautify your home's exterior with our weather-resistant painting solutions. We prep, prime, and paint to ensure long-lasting results that withstand Macon's climate.

services.title: Cabinet Refinishing
services.description: Give your kitchen or bathroom a fresh new look with our cabinet painting and refinishing services. We can transform tired cabinets into beautiful focal points.

services.title: Deck & Fence Staining
services.description: Preserve and enhance your outdoor wood surfaces with professional staining services. We use high-quality stains that protect against weather damage and UV rays.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.description: Prepare surfaces properly with our pressure washing services. We clean siding, decks, driveways, and more to ensure the best paint adhesion and finish.

about.heading: Workmanship that brings you back
about.body: We're the painters Macon residents call when they want it done right the first time. Every project gets the same attention to detail, whether it's a single room or a complete interior makeover. Our brushwork speaks for itself — just ask our customers who keep coming back.

reviews.name: Kara P.
reviews.text: Hired them for my son's new apartment and was so impressed with the workmanship that I called them back for another project. Magnificent job!

cta.heading: Ready for that fresh paint look?
cta.body: Get a detailed estimate for your painting project. No pressure, just honest pricing and quality workmanship you can count on.
